node_data.name: Egg Scramble — Garlic-Ginger Bake
node_data.short_description: An egg scramble with spinach and tomatoes cooked in olive oil; a simple, protein-forward dish featuring vegetables.
node_data.meal_suggestion: Best as a quick breakfast or light lunch; pair with whole-grain toast or fruit for extra fiber and complex carbs.
node_data.nutrition_note: Protein-rich eggs provide essential amino acids and satiety; olive oil contributes heart-healthy fats; spinach and tomatoes add fiber, vitamins A, C, and K, and minerals—resulting in a balanced, quick breakfast.
